description.en: The World's First FLock University Course. Learn everything about FLock.io: federated learning, AI Arena, FL Alliance, FOMO, tokenomics, and the decentralized AI ecosystem. Bilingual Chinese + English.
description.zh: 世界首个 FLock 大学课程。学习 FLock.io 的一切：联邦学习、AI Arena、FL Alliance、FOMO、代币经济学和去中心化 AI 生态。中英双语。

learningOutcomes: Explain what FLock.io is and why decentralised AI matters
Describe FLock.io's three core products: AI Arena, FL Alliance, and FOMO
Identify the four participant roles in AI Arena (Task Creator, Training Node, Validator, Delegator)
Understand how FLOCK token incentivises ecosystem participation
Use FLock API platform to build AI-powered applications
Formulate a personal participation plan for the FLock ecosystem

modules.learningObjective: Understand FLock.io's mission and core concept of federated learning combined with blockchain.
modules.passSignal: The learner can explain what federated learning is and why FLock exists in their own words.

title.zh: AI Arena — 去中心化 AI 训练

modules.learningObjective: Understand AI Arena platform and the four participant roles.
modules.passSignal: The learner can explain the difference between a Training Node and Validator.

modules.learningObjective: Understand how FL Alliance improves upon AI Arena models with proprietary data.
modules.passSignal: The learner can explain why FL Alliance is important for data privacy.

title.zh: FOMO — FLock 开放模型发行

modules.learningObjective: Understand how FOMO turns AI models into usage-backed economic assets.
modules.passSignal: The learner can explain FOMO's core design principle and describe the four participant roles.

modules.learningObjective: Understand how FLOCK token powers the ecosystem and the slash mechanism.
modules.passSignal: The learner can explain why staking is necessary for Training Nodes and Validators.

title.zh: API 平台与开发者工具

modules.learningObjective: Learn to build AI-powered applications using FLock's OpenAI-compatible API.
modules.passSignal: The learner can explain what changes are needed to switch from OpenAI to FLock API.

modules.learningObjective: Know the paths to participate in the FLock ecosystem based on personal background.
modules.passSignal: The learner has written a personal participation plan.

manifest.sensitiveDataHandling: This course references public FLock.io documentation and public blockchain data. No sensitive personal or financial data is used.
